name_en: M13409 Black & Color! LV x TM Zipper Coin Purse This timeless Louis Vuitton x Murakami series zipper coin purse combines practical function with a playful style, appearing even more vibrant this season. The coin purse is made of Monongram coated canvas and paired with cheerful rainbow tones, paying tribute to the distinctive color style of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The coin purse features a silver zipper and multiple internal compartments, keeping coins, bills, and business cards neatly organized.
